title: Domain pack safety_notes.yaml loader proof (NM-5 continuation)
problem: Ticket-118 proved search_templates.yaml drives research planner follow-up scoring and contract source_strategy. The creativity pack still has two other declarative files not loaded at runtime. NM-5 requires incremental proof that domain-pack files beyond the eight already loaded are consumed by the engine.
acceptance_criteria: safety_notes.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
At least one existing consumer reads pack-defined safety guidance instead of hardcoded duplicates.
Temp-pack unit test proves different safety note config changes audit or validation behavior.
Golden tests and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
No public export/site changes beyond reading pack metadata in auditor.
non_goals: No loading domain.yaml in the same ticket.
No public site routing or committed JSON changes.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
rollback_plan: Revert safety_notes loader wiring; restore inline auditor constants.
